content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

The ApplyFixes skip-when-no-findings feature is already fully implemented and tested. The engine (engine.rs:4590-4641) checks after Review completion whether outcome is Approved with empty findings_or_gaps and empty follow_up_or_amendments, and if the next stage is ApplyFixes. When all conditions hold, it logs the skip, persists a StageSkipped journal event, and advances past ApplyFixes. The journal module (journal.rs:190) provides stage_skipped_event() and the model (model.rs:359) includes the StageSkipped event type. Three unit tests cover skip/no-skip logic and one CLI integration test validates end-to-end behavior. All 754 tests pass, clippy and fmt are clean.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Read and understand engine.rs stage progression loop and existing skip logic at lines 4590-4641
2. [Completed] Verify journal.rs has stage_skipped_event() builder (line 190) and model.rs has StageSkipped event type (line 359)
3. [Completed] Verify unit tests: happy_path skip (line 1256), findings-present no-skip (line 1326), amendments-present no-skip (line 1393)
4. [Completed] Verify CLI integration test validates skipped stage behavior (cli.rs:7903)
5. [Completed] Run full test suite — 754 passed, 0 failed
6. [Completed] Run cargo clippy and cargo fmt --check — only pre-existing warnings, no new issues

## Validation Evidence

- cargo test: 754 passed, 0 failed, 0 ignored (lib tests); 9 ignored doc-tests
- cargo clippy: 16 pre-existing warnings (9 auto-fixable), no new warnings from this feature
- cargo fmt --check: no formatting issues
- engine.rs:4591-4596 implements the skip condition: Approved outcome + empty findings + empty follow_ups + next stage is ApplyFixes
- engine.rs:4598-4641 handles skip: logs info, persists StageSkipped journal event, increments stage_index
- Tests cover all three acceptance criteria paths: skip when no findings, run when findings present, run when amendments present
- CLI integration test (cli.rs:7903-7915) confirms only 5 payload files produced when ApplyFixes is skipped

## Outstanding Risks

None identified.
